channel.title: Archives on MK's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Archives on MK's Blog

item.title: Product Managers: Please Stop Using Google Docs
item.description: Introduction Product Manager’s at Instamojo write PRD in a Google Doc and share it to the software engineers. The Software Engineers can then look into it to understand the requirements and start working on it. This is a simple setup which just works without any friction. Rite? This setup fails when Google has an outage (Dec 14 2020, coincidentally my birthday) An index of google docs links should then be maintained elsewhere (probably in an excel sheet, with each sheet corresponding to a team).
